title: Create Strava credentials migration
description: Create database migration to add strava_credentials table with athlete_id, access_token, refresh_token, expires_at, scope, last_synced_at, created_at, updated_at columns
acceptance_criteria: strava_credentials.id: SERIAL PRIMARY KEY
strava_credentials.athlete_id: BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE
strava_credentials.access_token: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_credentials.refresh_token: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_credentials.expires_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
strava_credentials.scope: TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'activity:read_all'
strava_credentials.last_synced_at: TIMESTAMPTZ
strava_credentials.created_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
strava_credentials.updated_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()

title: Create Strava activities migration
description: Create database migration to add strava_activities table with strava_id, athlete_id, name, sport_type, start_date, distance_m, moving_time_s, elapsed_time_s, total_elevation_gain, average_speed_ms, max_speed_ms, average_heartrate, max_heartrate, average_watts, kilojoules, suffer_score, raw_data, synced_at columns
acceptance_criteria: strava_activities.id: SERIAL PRIMARY KEY
strava_activities.strava_id: BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE
strava_activities.athlete_id: BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES strava_credentials(athlete_id) ON DELETE CASCADE
strava_activities.name: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_activities.sport_type: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_activities.start_date: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
strava_activities.distance_m: NUMERIC(10,2)
strava_activities.moving_time_s: INTEGER
strava_activities.elapsed_time_s: INTEGER
strava_activities.total_elevation_gain: NUMERIC(8,2)
strava_activities.average_speed_ms: NUMERIC(8,4)
strava_activities.max_speed_ms: NUMERIC(8,4)
strava_activities.average_heartrate: NUMERIC(6,2)
strava_activities.max_heartrate: NUMERIC(6,2)
strava_activities.average_watts: NUMERIC(8,2)
strava_activities.kilojoules: NUMERIC(10,2)
strava_activities.suffer_score: INTEGER
strava_activities.raw_data: JSONB
strava_activities.synced_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()

title: Add Strava environment variables
description: Add STRAVA_CLIENT_ID, STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET, and STRAVA_REDIRECT_URI to environment configuration and validation
acceptance_criteria: STRAVA_CLIENT_ID is validated as required string in env.ts
STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET is validated as required string in env.ts
STRAVA_REDIRECT_URI is validated as required string in env.ts
All three variables are documented in .env.example

title: Create Strava tools module
description: Create strava.ts tools module with get_strava_oauth_url, get_strava_activities, and get_strava_trends functions, including OAuth state management and token refresh logic
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_oauth_url function generates OAuth URL with state token
get_strava_activities function queries database with sport_type and date filters
get_strava_trends function analyzes weekly volume and pace trends
Token refresh logic checks expires_at before API calls
All functions handle database connection errors gracefully
OAuth state tokens are stored and validated for CSRF protection

title: Add Strava OAuth callback endpoint
description: Add OAuth callback route to bot service to handle Strava authorization code exchange and credential storage
acceptance_criteria: OAuth callback endpoint validates state token for CSRF protection
Authorization code is exchanged for access and refresh tokens
Tokens are stored in strava_credentials table with athlete_id
Telegram confirmation message sent with athlete name
Error handling for invalid authorization codes or expired state tokens

title: Add initial activity sync on OAuth completion
description: Implement 90-day historical activity sync that runs after successful OAuth connection, fetching activities in paginated batches
acceptance_criteria: Fetches activities from last 90 days using Strava API
Handles pagination with 30 activities per page
Upserts activities into strava_activities table
Sends Telegram message with count of imported activities
Updates last_synced_at timestamp after successful sync

title: Add Strava sync job to scheduler
description: Add 30-minute cron job to scheduler.ts that syncs new Strava activities and refreshes tokens as needed
acceptance_criteria: Cron job runs every 30 minutes
Fetches activities updated since last_synced_at
Checks token expiration before each API call
Refreshes access token using refresh token when expired
Updates strava_credentials with new tokens and last_synced_at

title: Add Strava tools to agent tool registry
description: Register get_strava_oauth_url, get_strava_activities, and get_strava_trends tools in agent.ts tool definitions
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_oauth_url tool is registered with proper schema
get_strava_activities tool is registered with sport_type and date filters
get_strava_trends tool is registered for trend analysis queries
Tool schemas include required parameters and descriptions
Agent can successfully call all three Strava tools

title: Add activity snapshot to agent system prompt
description: Modify context.ts to include last 7 days Strava activity summary in agent system prompt for day planning context
acceptance_criteria: System prompt includes last 7 days activity count
System prompt includes total moving time for last 7 days
System prompt includes last activity sport and date
Activity snapshot is formatted for agent context
Handles case where no activities exist gracefully
